details: Sensivity@2.5.3 is a QR-phishing scam tool with persistence. launcher.js loads an obfuscated payload (server.obf.js) via eval(fs.readFileSync('server.obf.js','utf8')), masquerades its process as 'Runtime Broker', installs registry persistence at HKCU\Run as 'OneDriveUpdate', and deploys OneDrive.Standalone.Updater.vbs to silently launch the payload. It monitors Chrome for YouTube tabs every 3s and triggers a QR-code phishing flow to hxxp://192[.]168[.]1[.]16:3000, and ships a 6.8MB sens.node binary.
